description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image `registry.gitlab.com/clarin-eric/build-image:1.3.5` with a `docker:28.5.1-dind` service and set the Docker‑related variables `BUILD_PLATFORMS`, `DOCKER_CERT_PATH`, `DOCKER_DRIVER`, `DOCKER_HOST`, `DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR`, `DOCKER_TLS_VERIFY`, and `GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY`. Define the stages `lint`, `build`, `test`, `security`, and `release`. In the lint stage add `lint-dockerfile` running `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --lint-docker` and `shell-check` running `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --lint-shell`. In the build stage add a `build` job tagged `docker` that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --build` and stores all files as untracked artifacts; in the test stage add a `test` job (depends on `build`, tagged `docker`) that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --test`. In the security stage add `informative-vulnerability-scan` (allow_failure true, variable `SCAN_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD=low`) and `normative-vulnerability-scan` (allow_failure false, tags `docker`, variables `SCAN_FAIL_ON=all` and `SCAN_SEVERITY_THRESHOLD=high`) both running `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --scan`; finally, add a `release` job in the release stage tagged `docker` that runs `timeout 1440 bash -x ./build.sh --release` and is limited to tags or pipeline triggers.
